name: Calculadora de Moldura de Teto
seo_title: Calculadora de Moldura – Metros Lineares e Peças
seo_description: Calcule quanta moldura de teto você precisa. Insira as dimensões do quarto para obter o perímetro, metros lineares, número de peças e cantos com 15% de desperdício.
description: Calculadora 1113. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Identify what you want to calculate with the Crown Molding Calculator.
Enter the room length in the input field.
Enter the room width in the input field.
Enter the corner type in the input field.
Fill in the remaining fields with your measurements.
Click Calculate to see your result instantly.
mistakes: Entering values in the wrong units — check that all measurements use the same unit system.
Forgetting to include a waste or safety margin — add 5-10% extra for real-world projects.
Using incorrect default values — verify the suggested defaults match your specific situation.
Rounding intermediate values too early — keep full precision until the final result.
formula_display: Perimeter = 2 Ã— (length + width); Linear metres needed = perimeter Ã— 1.1; Pieces = ceil(linear_m Ã· molding_length)
